UI_BII_ShowFoodInfo_tooltip: Show spoilage and nutrition details for food.
UI_BII_ShowLiquidInfo_tooltip: Show fluid amount, capacity, and liquid nutrition details.
UI_BII_ShowWeaponInfo_tooltip: Show weapon stats based on character skills.
UI_BII_ShowSeedInfo_tooltip: Show growing seasons and growth time for seeds.
UI_BII_ShowMetalInfo_tooltip: Show smelting and scrapping metal information.
UI_BII_ShowFuelInfo_tooltip: Show how long burnable items fuel a fire.
UI_BII_ShowElectronicsInfo_tooltip: Show items dismantled for electrical XP.
UI_BII_ShowBookInfo_tooltip: Show remaining read time for skill books.
UI_BII_ShowRemainingInfo_tooltip: Show numeric remaining uses for drainable items.
